item.title: Why does my brain need subtitles?
item.description: A lighthearted look at feeling like you need subtitles, with a nod to ADHD, auditory processing disorder, and neurodivergence.

media:content.media:title: Why does my brain need subtitles?
media:content.media:description: A lighthearted look at feeling like you need subtitles, with a nod to ADHD, auditory processing disorder, and neurodivergence.

item.title: ADHD Diagnoses in Adults: A Closer Look
item.description: For decades, ADHD was stereotyped as a condition affecting hyperactive schoolboys. However, a massive wave of adult women over 35 are finally getting diagnosed after years of masking their symptoms, often misinterpreting chronic exhaustion, mental load overwhelm, and anxiety as personal failures rather than executive dysfunction.

media:content.media:title: ADHD Diagnoses in Adults: A Closer Look
media:content.media:description: For decades, ADHD was stereotyped as a condition affecting hyperactive schoolboys. However, a massive wave of adult women over 35 are finally getting diagnosed after years of masking their symptoms, often misinterpreting chronic exhaustion, mental load overwhelm, and anxiety as personal failures rather than executive dysfunction.

item.title: A sign of burnout to notice
item.description: If your usual workload suddenly feels completely overwhelming, it might not be a lack of motivation. Experts warn that a drastic drop in your daily frustration tolerance is one of the earliest, most overlooked signs of chronic burnout.

media:content.media:title: A sign of burnout to notice
media:content.media:description: If your usual workload suddenly feels completely overwhelming, it might not be a lack of motivation. Experts warn that a drastic drop in your daily frustration tolerance is one of the earliest, most overlooked signs of chronic burnout.

item.title: Could this be an ADHD thing?
item.description: Dr. Sasha Hamdani shares a simple insight about ADHD that may help explain everyday experiences.

media:content.media:title: Could this be an ADHD thing?
media:content.media:description: Dr. Sasha Hamdani shares a simple insight about ADHD that may help explain everyday experiences.

item.title: Turn it sideways, and I’m fine
item.description: If you know, you know — my body is very committed to this one.

media:content.media:title: Turn it sideways, and I’m fine
media:content.media:description: If you know, you know — my body is very committed to this one.

item.title: ADHD and the pressure to try harder
item.description: A look at how people with ADHD are often told to try harder throughout life.

media:content.media:title: ADHD and the pressure to try harder
media:content.media:description: A look at how people with ADHD are often told to try harder throughout life.

item.title: Understanding time blindness with ADHD
item.description: Time blindness can make it difficult to accurately sense the passage of time, estimate how long tasks will take, or transition between activities. Learn why it happens and how it can affect daily life for people with ADHD.

media:content.media:title: Understanding time blindness with ADHD
media:content.media:description: Time blindness can make it difficult to accurately sense the passage of time, estimate how long tasks will take, or transition between activities. Learn why it happens and how it can affect daily life for people with ADHD.

item.title: A nervous system request, explained
item.description: A relatable note on wanting things clean, not rearranged, framed as a nervous system request.

media:content.media:title: A nervous system request, explained
media:content.media:description: A relatable note on wanting things clean, not rearranged, framed as a nervous system request.

item.title: How Skipping a Meal Can Affect Your Day
item.description: Missing a meal can impact energy, focus, mood, and decision-making. Learn how consistent nutrition supports your brain and why skipping meals may

media:content.media:title: How Skipping a Meal Can Affect Your Day
media:content.media:description: Missing a meal can impact energy, focus, mood, and decision-making. Learn how consistent nutrition supports your brain and why skipping meals may

item.title: Heat and ADHD: You're Not Alone
item.description: Hot weather can make ADHD symptoms feel more noticeable by affecting focus, energy, mood, and mental clarity. A look at why heat can be especially challenging and how to better manage it.

media:content.media:title: Heat and ADHD: You're Not Alone
media:content.media:description: Hot weather can make ADHD symptoms feel more noticeable by affecting focus, energy, mood, and mental clarity. A look at why heat can be especially challenging and how to better manage it.

item.title: Why People With ADHD May Forget to Eat
item.description: ADHD can affect hunger awareness, time management, and executive function, making it surprisingly easy to skip meals without realizing it. Learn why this happens and why regular nutrition matters.

media:content.media:title: Why People With ADHD May Forget to Eat
media:content.media:description: ADHD can affect hunger awareness, time management, and executive function, making it surprisingly easy to skip meals without realizing it. Learn why this happens and why regular nutrition matters.

item.title: Stuck in startup mode?
item.description: If your brain needs 12 tabs open just to begin, this one’s for you.

media:content.media:title: Stuck in startup mode?
media:content.media:description: If your brain needs 12 tabs open just to begin, this one’s for you.

item.title: A reminder for when your brain needs it
item.description: A simple reminder to save for the moments when you need a quick reset.

media:content.media:title: A reminder for when your brain needs it
media:content.media:description: A simple reminder to save for the moments when you need a quick reset.

item.title: Clinically correct, still running late
item.description: Sometimes you know exactly what to do, but your brain still won't cooperate. A relatable look at how ADHD can affect executive function, making it difficult to turn knowledge into action.

media:content.media:title: Clinically correct, still running late
media:content.media:description: Sometimes you know exactly what to do, but your brain still won't cooperate. A relatable look at how ADHD can affect executive function, making it difficult to turn knowledge into action.

item.title: Tips for Struggling with Eating
item.description: Practical strategies for making eating feel more manageable, especially on days when low energy, overwhelm, or executive function challenges make regular meals harder to maintain.

media:content.media:title: Tips for Struggling with Eating
media:content.media:description: Practical strategies for making eating feel more manageable, especially on days when low energy, overwhelm, or executive function challenges make regular meals harder to maintain.
